question: What are the names of all books and their corresponding authors?
sql: SELECT Book.Title, Author.Name FROM Book JOIN Author_Book ON Book.ISBN = Author_Book.ISBN JOIN Author ON Author_Book.Author = Author.idAuthor;

back_translation.intent: 获取书籍及其对应的作者信息

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取所有书籍及其对应作者名称，SQL描述中意图、目标列(Book.Title, Author.Name)及未涉及过滤/聚合/分组等操作均与原始问题完全匹配。虽然包含Author_Book中间表，但该表通常用于关联书籍与作者，符合'corresponding authors'的语义需求。
